name: pixflow-design-share-to-community
title: Share to community
description: Package the work the user just finished into an Pixflow Design plugin and route them to the existing Add-to-My-plugins / Pixflow-Design-PR buttons. Triggered by the post-completion 'Share to Pixflow Design' submission action.

description_i18n.en: Package the work the user just finished into an Pixflow Design plugin and route them to the existing Add-to-My-plugins / Pixflow-Design-PR buttons. Triggered by the post-completion 'Share to Pixflow Design' submission action.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 把用户刚做完的作品打包成 Pixflow Design 插件,然后引导他们点已有的 Add to My plugins / Pixflow Design PR 按钮。由生成完成后的 'Share to Pixflow Design' 投稿操作触发。

query.en: Package the work I just finished in this project as an Pixflow Design plugin so I can install it into My plugins and open a PR to the Pixflow Design community catalog. Auto-derive the manifest from what's already in the project — don't ask me for fields the project files already answer.
query.zh-CN: 把我在这个 project 里刚做完的作品打包成一个 Pixflow Design 插件,让我可以安装到 My plugins 并提交 PR 到 Pixflow Design 社区。manifest 从项目里已有的内容自动推断,别问我已经能从文件里看出来的字段。
